duplicates.title: Daily Spike In Rss Counts For Cybersecurity Breach News Triggers Bearish Tech Sector Rotation

idea.title: Daily Spike In Rss Counts For Cybersecurity Breach News Triggers Bearish Tech Sector Rotation
idea.thesis: A daily surge in cybersecurity breach news increases risk aversion for tech stocks, often triggering rotation away from technology. Breach news raises perceived risk and potential costs for tech companies.
idea.signal_logic: If daily RSS count for 'cybersecurity breach' news rises 30% day-over-day
idea.entry_exit: Entry: If daily RSS count for 'cybersecurity breach' news rises 30% day-over-day Exit: After 5 trading days or when counts decline 20% from peak
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use RSS news feed counts via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Cyber attack news spikes often cluster around new revelations or exploits.
